response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 15 years of professional experience, including recent full-stack work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq. A strong testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses) and cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) align well with the role. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin exposure, and a current career gap, but the overall profile fits the role well.
strengths: Deep full-stack experience with the core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS
Hands-on AI agent development and MCP tooling experience, an explicit job requirement
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, authored test libraries, ran testing workshops)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, though adjacent frameworks are covered
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated and limited
Current career gap since October 2025 may need clarification on availability and ramp-up
